perFrameCode: fg = BPM/60; Q=1.8; omega = 6.283*min(0.5,fg/fps); tcos = cos (omega); alpha = sin(omega)/(2*Q);
b0=(1-tcos)/2; b1=1-tcos; b2=(1-tcos)/2; a0=1+alpha; a1=-2*tcos; a2=1-alpha;
X = vol; LastOut= b0a0*X + b1a0*in1 + b2a0*in2 - a1a0*ou1 - a2a0*ou2;
qdev = 0; i =0; loop (num_res, qdev += pow(megabuf(i+3)-qavg,2); i += 8; );
c1 = cos(ax); c2 = cos(ay); c3 = cos(az); s1 = sin(ax); s2 = sin(ay); s3 = sin(az);
c1 = cos(xang); c2 = cos(yang); c3 = cos(zang);
s1 = sin(xang); s2 = sin(yang); s3 = sin(zang);
mx = ox*c3 - oy*s3; my = ox*s3 + oy*c3;    ox = mx; oy = my;
mx = ox*c2 + oz*s2; mz = - ox*s2 + oz*c2;  ox = mx; oz = mz;
my = oy*c1 - oz*s1; mz = oy*s1 + oz*c1;    oy = my; oz = mz;
x0 = ox+dia/2; y0 = oy; z0 = oz+slen+.1;
xang = 0; yang = 0; zang = 6.283 * stab/nstab; //alle Stebe anordnen
c1 = cos(xang); c2 = cos(yang); c3 = cos(zang);
s1 = sin(xang); s2 = sin(yang); s3 = sin(zang);
mx = ox*c3 - oy*s3; my = ox*s3 + oy*c3;    ox = mx; oy = my;
mx = ox*c2 + oz*s2; mz = - ox*s2 + oz*c2;  ox = mx; oz = mz;
my = oy*c1 - oz*s1; mz = oy*s1 + oz*c1;    oy = my; oz = mz;
n = 100; loop (100, gmegabuf(n)=gmegabuf(n-1); n-=1); vol_ = vol_*0.5 + 0.5*vol; gmegabuf(0) = vol_;
n = 0; num = 60/BPM/dt; //Num delay bins auf nstab abbilden
